title: Strip in-process rate limiting, delegate to reverse proxy
description: Deployment invariant: broadside runs behind Caddy (or nginx/ALB). Strip ratelimit.rs module entirely (~55 lines), remove inbox_limiter from AppState, remove try_acquire call from inbox handler (server.rs:705), remove prune task from server.rs. Replace with ponytail comment: 'inbox rate limiting delegated to reverse proxy (Caddy rate_limit, nginx limit_req_zone)'. The in-memory token bucket doesn't survive restarts, doesn't share state across instances, and is trivially bypassed by rotating IPs. Caddy's rate_limit directive is superior. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.
